Projects

A collection of my work and side projects

Filter by:

Research

Balance Control System on ERISA Humanoid Dance Robot (GCoM-based Analysis)

Implemented a closed-loop balance controller for the 29-DoF ERISA humanoid dance robot using IMU-based pitch feedback, Five-Link GCoM analysis, and PD control.

Humanoid Robot ERISA Balance Control Center of Mass Five-Link Model IMU PD Control
View Details →
Internship

HMI/Touchscreen for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charger

Developed an HMI-based monitoring and operation interface for an EV charger. Implemented display control and charging-process monitoring, payment-method management, and fault detection.

HMI EV Charger Monitoring Industrial Automation Schneider Beijer Electronics UI Design
View Details →
Full-time

Chiller Monitoring (IoT)

IoT-based monitoring system for a chiller. Monitors chiller input/output temperatures using thermocouple sensors, observes chiller status, compressor, and water pump, and displays data on a website via Wi-Fi.

IoT ESP32 Thermocouple Temperature Sensing Wi-Fi Web Dashboard
View Details →
Full-time

Automatic Guided Vehicle (AGV)

Autonomous material transport AGV for warehouse-to-production logistics.

Pixy camera NFC Proximity Sensor PID Control Hoverboard Motors Embedded System
View Details →
Full-time

Semi-automatic Winding Machine

Semi-automatic machine that combines winding and insulation stripping to improve production output and reduce labor costs.

Automation Winding Insulation Stripping Pneumatic Servo Drive Double Acting Cylinder HMI
View Details →

Mechanical Design

Design new products, calculate production costs, source suppliers, and build/test jigs for mass production.

3D Modelling Creo Technical Drawing Mass Production 3D Print Milling Machine
View Details →
